risks.traffic_leak_desc: Robots.txt is permissive with no llms.txt. AI scrapers can ingest your content without citation guidance.
risks.blind_assistants_desc: No llms.txt found. Your content may be summarized by AI engines but never cited.
risks.provenance_risk_desc: Your content allows AI training sets to ingest without linking back.
